BaseURL.title: Base URL
BaseURL.description: Customer's NetForum Enterprise base URL (e.g., https://customer.netforum.example.com). The connector calls /xWeb/JSON/Authenticate at this host to obtain a Bearer token.

Password.title: Password
Password.description: NetForum xWeb API password. Used with Basic auth on the /xWeb/JSON/Authenticate endpoint to mint the Bearer token.
